name: kreuzberg
description: Curated document-intelligence plugins by Kreuzberg, Inc.

plugins.name: kreuzberg
plugins.description: Local document extraction: text, tables, metadata, images from 91+ formats with optional OCR.

plugins.name: kreuzcrawl
plugins.description: Web crawling and scraping with HTML→Markdown and headless-Chrome fallback.

plugins.name: kreuzberg-cloud
plugins.description: Managed Kreuzberg document intelligence on api.kreuzberg.dev: async extraction with OCR, URL crawling, presigned uploads, document versioning and diffing, signed webhooks, and usage tracking. Skills today; CLI + MCP server arrive in v0.2.0.
